data.title: GrafTech reports Q2 2025 results: 12% sales volume growth. Expecting 10% increase in sales volume for full year.
data.description: In Brooklyn Heights, Ohio, GrafTech International Ltd. (NYSE: EAF) shared its unaudited financial figures for the quarter and six months ending on June 30, 2025. The company reported a remarkable 12% increase in sales volume for the second quarter of 2025 compared to the previous year, marking GrafTech's best sales volume achievement since Q3 of 2022. They are anticipating a further 10% rise in sales volume for the entire year of 2025.

data.title: Weekly recap: 13 consumer press releases from PR Newswire including Ariana Grande fragrances, Miller Lite's 50th anniversary, and Harley-Davidson motorcycle giveaway.
data.description: This week, PR Newswire published significant updates in the consumer and retail sectors. Highlights include the launch of new scents from Ariana Grande, celebrations for Miller Lite's 50th anniversary, and an exciting motorcycle giveaway courtesy of Harley-Davidson. The news, released on July 25, 2025, featured a multitude of press releases showcasing various companies' latest developments.

data.title: Pump.fun's $500M raise in just 12 mins reflects retail FOMO. Record public sale, acquisitions, and ecosystem growth showcased.
data.description: Pump.fun has experienced significant growth, with a record-breaking public sale, strategic acquisitions, and expansion of its ecosystem. The rise of Pump.fun underscores a focus on user-driven token distribution, with key numbers indicating strong performance in sales and expansion efforts.

data.title: First Citizens BancShares declared dividends for common and preferred stock on July 25, 2025, to be paid on September 15 to holders of record by August 29.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Raleigh, North Carolina, First Citizens BancShares, Inc. (Nasdaq: FCNCA) announced dividend declarations for its common and preferred stock. The dividends will be paid on September 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of August 29.
